channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: IEBC Denies Election Rigging Claims and Reaffirms Independence Ahead of Kenya’s 2027 General Election
item.description: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission (IEBC) has firmly dismissed allegations suggesting there are plans to rig or manipulate Kenya’s 2027 General Election. In a strong statement, the Co...

item.title: Clashes erupt between protesters and ICE at New Jersey detention center amid disputes over detainee conditions
item.description: Protests continued at Newark, New Jersey’s Delaney Hall detention facility as demonstrators clashed with U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) officers amid ongoing allegations about detainee...

item.title: Nevada Governor Joe Lombardo Addresses Concerns Over Trump's Tariffs Impact on State Tourism Economy
item.description: In a recent interview with 2 News Nevada, Republican Nevada Governor Joe Lombardo appeared uncomfortable when questioned about the effects of President Donald Trump's tariff policies on the state's ec...

item.title: Rick Wilson Claims Trump Health Concerns Are Being Downplayed by the White House
item.description: A Raw Story article reports on comments made by former Republican strategist Rick Wilson regarding President Donald Trump’s health and recent medical visits. Wilson reacted to Trump’s scheduled appoin...

item.title: Analysts say Trump’s grocery price policy would have negligible impact on consumer prices
item.description: A recent report challenges the Trump administration’s claim that its policy changes would meaningfully reduce grocery prices for American consumers. The administration recently relaxed federal regulat...

item.title: South Carolina Senate halts GOP redistricting effort amid timing dispute, sparking backlash from Trump allies
item.description: A Republican-led effort in South Carolina to advance a new congressional redistricting plan, aligned with President Donald Trump's broader push for GOP-controlled states to redraw maps in their favor,...

item.title: Christof Koch and Integrated Information Theory Reframe Consciousness as a Fundamental Property of Reality
item.description: The article discusses an ongoing debate in neuroscience and philosophy of mind about the nature of consciousness. For much of modern science, consciousness has been understood as an emergent product o...

item.title: Akpabio Urges Nigerians To Embrace Unity, Sacrifice And Prayer During Eid-el-Kabir

item.title: Multiple deaths and critical injuries after tank explosion at Washington paper mill
item.description: Several people have died and others have suffered critical injuries following a chemical explosion at the Nippon Dynawave Packaging paper mill in Longview, Washington. According to the Longview Fire D...

item.title: Joe Rogan Criticizes Trump Settlement Blocking Future IRS Actions Against Him and His Family
item.description: Podcast host Joe Rogan publicly criticized President Donald Trump after reports emerged about a controversial legal settlement involving the Internal Revenue Service and the Department of Justice. Dur...

item.title: Rare Childhood Photos and Early Life Story of Stevie Nicks in the 1940s and 1950s
item.description: Stevie Nicks, the iconic American singer-songwriter famous for her work with Fleetwood Mac and as a solo artist, had a unique and musically rich childhood. Born Stephanie Lynn Nicks on May 26, 1948, i...

item.title: Former Clients’ Malpractice Lawsuit Against Todd Blanche Continues Amid DOJ Role
item.description: A report from Vanity Fair details an ongoing malpractice lawsuit involving Todd Blanche, who is currently serving as acting Attorney General under President Donald Trump. The lawsuit stems from Blanch...

item.title: Planned Closure of USDA Bee Research Lab Raises Concerns Over Pollinator Health and Food Security
item.description: A report published by The Conversation examines the planned closure of the Beltsville Bee Research Lab, a major U.S. Department of Agriculture facility dedicated to honey bee and pollinator research. ...

item.title: NetEase Permanently Bans Cheaters in Marvel Rivals and Debunks Anti-Cheat Bypass Rumors
item.description: NetEase Games has launched a significant crackdown on cheaters in Marvel Rivals, permanently banning accounts found using cheats, illegal tools, or client modifications. The action applies across all ...

item.title: Clarence Thomas dissent criticized after Supreme Court rejects Florida interstate lawsuit over driver’s licenses
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court declined to hear a lawsuit brought by Florida against California and Washington, which alleged that those states improperly allowed undocumented immigrants to obtain commercial ...

item.title: AAC Picks Omoyele Sowore As Presidential Candidate For 2027 Election
item.description: Human rights activist and former presidential aspirant Omoyele Sowore don emerge as the presidential candidate of the African Action Congress (AAC) for the 2027 general election after the party primar...

item.title: Texas GOP voters split over Trump endorsement in Senate runoff between Paxton and Cornyn
item.description: In a closely watched Texas Republican Senate runoff, voters showed sharply divided reactions to President Donald Trump’s endorsement of Attorney General Ken Paxton over incumbent Senator John Cornyn. ...

item.title: COFEK raises alarm over Finance Bill 2026 tax proposals citing higher living costs and consumer risks
item.description: The Consumers Federation of Kenya (COFEK) has raised strong concerns over several provisions in the Finance Bill 2026, warning that they could increase the cost of living, weaken consumer protections,...

item.title: Marina Hyde satirises Trump’s use of Iran tensions as a pretext to miss his son’s wedding
item.description: This opinion piece by Marina Hyde offers a satirical commentary on Donald Trump, blending political critique with humour to examine how international tensions are portrayed as serving personal conveni...

item.title: Expert Warns Trump's Policies and AI Adoption Could Trigger Severe Economic Downturn
item.description: According to former Homeland Security official Miles Taylor, President Donald Trump is presiding over economic conditions that could lead to a severe and potentially long-lasting recession. Taylor hig...
